Scratch.description: Hard, pointed, sharp claws rake the target to inflict damage.

Growl.description: The user growls in an endearing way, lowering the target's Attack stat.

Ember.description: The target is attacked with small flames. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Smokescreen.description: The user releases an obscuring cloud of smoke or ink, sharply lowering the target's accuracy.

Dragon Breath.description: The user exhales a mighty gust of dragon energy. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Fire Fang.description: The user bites with fiery fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with a burn.

Slash.description: The target is attacked with a slash of claws, etc. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Flamethrower.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Flame Burst.description: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages Pokémon next to the target as well.

Fire Spin.description: The target becomes trapped within a fierce vortex of fire that rages for four to five turns.

Inferno.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. This leaves the target with a burn.

Flare Blitz.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the target. This also damages the user and may leave the target with a burn.

Ancient Power.description: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also raise all the user's stats at once.

Beat Up.description: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.

Body Slam.description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Breaking Swipe.description: The user swings its tail or a similar appendage to strike the target and lower its Attack stat.

Brick Break.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This can also break through barriers such as Light Screen and Reflect.

Crunch.description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Cut.description: The target is cut with a long, sharp blade or claw.

Dig.description: The user burrows into the ground, then attacks on the next turn. It can also be used to exit dungeons.

Dragon Claw.description: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws.

Dragon Dance.description: The user vigorously performs a mystic dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

Dragon Pulse.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

Dragon Tail.description: The target is struck with a tail so powerful that it knocks the target out of battle.

Echoed Voice.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used every turn, its power increases.

Endure.description: The user endures any attack, leaving it with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if used in succession.

Facade.description: This attack move doubles its power if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

False Swipe.description: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

Fire Blast.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Fire Pledge.description: The user attacks by sending a column of fire toward the target. This move's power is boosted when combined with others.

Fire Punch.description: The target is punched with a fiery fist. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Flame Charge.description: Cloaking itself in flame, the user attacks the target. This also raises the user's Speed stat.

Fling.description: The user flings its held item at the target. The move's power and effects depend on the item.

Focus Blast.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Special Defense.

Focus Punch.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before it is used.

Fury Cutter.description: The target is slashed with scythes or claws. This attack becomes more powerful with each successive hit.

Headbutt.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks. This may also make the target flinch.

Heat Wave.description: The user attacks by exhaling a hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.

Helping Hand.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

Hone Claws.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

Incinerate.description: The user attacks the target with fire. If the target is holding a Berry, it is destroyed and cannot be used.

Iron Tail.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Mega Kick.description: The target is attacked by a powerful kick.

Mega Punch.description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with great power.

Metal Claw.description: The target is raked with steel claws. This may also raise the user's Attack stat.

Outrage.description: The user rampages and attacks for two or three turns. The user then becomes confused.

Overheat.description: The user attacks at full power. The attack's recoil harshly lowers the user's Special Attack stat.

Power-Up Punch.description: The user attacks with a punch. This also raises the user's Attack stat.

Protect.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if used in succession.

Rest.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and heals any status conditions.

Roar.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends the battle.

Rock Slide.description: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.

Rock Smash.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Rock Tomb.description: The user hurls boulders at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

Scary Face.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

Shadow Claw.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with claws made from shadows. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Sleep Talk.description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

Strength.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown with tremendous force.

Substitute.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

Sunny Day.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

Swift.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

Swords Dance.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply raises the user's Attack stat.

Take Down.description: A reckless full-body charge attack that also damages the user a little.

Temper Flare.description: The user attacks by breathing pure heat at the target. This move's power is doubled if the user was damaged this turn.

Tera Blast.description: The user attacks with energy from its Tera type. If the user has Terastallized, this move's type becomes the Tera type.

Thunder Punch.description: The target is punched with an electrified fist. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Weather Ball.description: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

Will-O-Wisp.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

Work Up.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Special Attack stats are raised.

Belly Drum.description: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses half of its max HP.

Bite.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

Counter.description: A retaliation move that counters any physical attack, inflicting double the damage taken.

Dragon Rage.description: This attack always inflicts 40 HP damage.

Dragon Rush.description: The user charges at the target with great force. This may also make the target flinch.

Wing Attack.description: The target is struck with wings or a similar appendage.

Blast Burn.description: The target is hit with a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.

Block.description: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent escape.

Air Slash.description: The user attacks with a blade of air. This may also make the target flinch.

Acrobatics.description: The user nimbly strikes the target. This attack does more damage if the user is not holding an item.

Aerial Ace.description: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

Air Cutter.description: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Blaze Kick.description: The user launches a fiery kick. This may also leave the target with a burn and has a high critical-hit ratio.

Brutal Swing.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

Bulldoze.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

Double-Edge.description: A reckless, life-risking tackle. This also damages the user.

Dragon Cheer.description: The user raises its allies' morale with a cheering display. This raises their critical-hit ratio.

Earthquake.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

Fly.description: The user flies up high on the first turn, then strikes on the next turn.

Giga Impact.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

Heat Crash.description: The user slams into the target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the power.

Hurricane.description: The user attacks by wrapping the target in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

Hyper Beam.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

Mystical Fire.description: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Special Attack stat.

Ominous Wind.description: The user blasts the target with a gust of repulsive wind. This may also raise all the user's stats at once.

Roost.description: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half of its max HP.

Sandstorm.description: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon on the field, except Rock, Ground, and Steel types.

Schorching Sands.description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Sky Drop.description: The user takes the target into the sky on the first turn, then drops it on the next. The target cannot attack while in the sky.

Solar Beam.description: The user gathers light energy on the first turn, then fires a powerful beam on the next turn.

Steel Wing.description: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also raise the user's Defense stat.

Twister.description: The user whips up a violent, twisting wind to tear into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

Tackle.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

Water Gun.description: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

Jaw Lock.description: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.

Liquidation.description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Assurance.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken some damage in the same turn.

Chilling Water.description: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

Dive.description: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.

Gastro Acid.description: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the target. The fluid eliminates the effect of the target's Ability.

Hydro Pump.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

Ice Fang.description: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it frozen.

Mud Shot.description: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

Payback.description: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

Poison Jab.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, an arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

Rain Dance.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

Revenge.description: This attack move's power is doubled if the user has been hurt by the opponent in the same turn.

Skitter Smack.description: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

Stomping Tantrum.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

Surf.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

Waterfall.description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

Water Pulse.description: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

Whirlpool.description: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

Shell Smash.description: The user breaks its shell, which lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

Skull Bash.description: The user tucks in its head to raise its Defense stat on the first turn, then rams the target on the next turn.

Razor Shell.description: The user cuts the target with sharp shells to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Rock Polish.description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. This sharply boosts the user's Speed stat.

Head Smash.description: The user attacks the target with a hazardous full-power headbutt. This also damages the user terribly.

Blizzard.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

Body Press.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

Earth Power.description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

High Horsepower.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

Ice Spinner.description: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

Iron Defense.description: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

Megahorn.description: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

Meteor Beam.description: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

Muddy Water.description: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

Rock Blast.description: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

Sand Tomb.description: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

Smart Strike.description: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

Stealth Rock.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

Stone Edge.description: The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

Super Fang.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

Superpower.description: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

Throat Chop.description: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

Ice Beam.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

Pound.description: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

Double Slap.description: The target is slapped repeatedly, back and forth, two to five times in a row.

Mirror Move.description: The user counters the target by mimicking the target's last move.

Peck.description: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.

Baton Pass.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

Feather Dance.description: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

Teeter Dance.description: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses every Pokémon around it.

Flatter.description: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.

Revelation Dance.description: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.

Agility.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

Alluring Voice.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

Attract.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

Calm Mind.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

Captivate.description: If any opposing Pokémon is the opposite gender of the user, it is charmed, which harshly lowers its Sp. Atk stat.

Charm.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

Covet.description: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

Defog.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

Dual Wingbeat.description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

Embargo.description: This move prevents the target from using its held item for five turns. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

Icy Wind.description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

Pluck.description: The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

Psych Up.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

Quash.description: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

Reversal.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

Role Play.description: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.

Safeguard.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

Sky Attack.description: The user attacks the turn after using this move. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also make the target flinch.

Tailwind.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

Taunt.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

Trailblaze.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

U-turn.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

Quiver Dance.description: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. This boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

Focus Energy.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

Quick Attack.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

Double Team.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

Quick Guard.description: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves.

Endeavor.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

Brave Bird.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

Mud-Slap.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

Thief.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

Boomburst.description: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

Pursuit.description: The power of this attack move is doubled if it's used on a target that's switching out of battle.

Rage.description: As long as this move is in use, the power of rage raises the Attack stat each time the user is hit in battle.

Refresh.description: The user rests to cure itself of poisoning, a burn, or paralysis.

Supersonic.description: The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target.

Whirlwind.description: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

Laser Focus.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.
